tiles.title: Apollo 18 Veinstone

tiles.styleDescription: Earthy, elegant, and ideal for calm luxury interiors.

tiles.title: Classic 04 Pearl Vein
tiles.description: Soft white tile with flowing gold and silver veining for a bright, luxurious surface.

tiles.styleDescription: Clean, luminous, and tailored for upscale modern spaces.

tiles.title: Apollo 16 Cloud Marble
tiles.description: White marble-look tile with subtle gray motion and a crisp contemporary surface.

tiles.styleDescription: Quiet, polished, and suited to minimalist interiors.

tiles.title: Elegant Alpha Slate
tiles.description: Dramatic dark stone pattern with green-gray movement and rich layered depth.
tiles.creator: Elegant Alpha Studio
tiles.styleDescription: Bold, moody, and perfect for a statement feature wall.

tiles.title: Classic Super 4 Frost
tiles.description: Soft gray-white tile with delicate gold veining and a clean, premium finish.

tiles.styleDescription: Quiet luxury with a bright, airy presence.

tiles.title: Apollo 21 Mist Gray
tiles.description: Blue-gray stone tile with fractured veining and a cool, architectural tone.

tiles.styleDescription: Modern, cool, and dramatic for refined contemporary spaces.
